summary: Hub collector now consumes Aitri Core's canonical ProjectSnapshot (aitri status --json, v0.1.77+) with snapshot-first dispatch, structured failure logging, and ProjectCard surfaces (NEXT ACTION, DEPLOY HEALTH, staleness, normalize warnings, last-session) backed by snapshot data. Legacy readers retained as documented fallback path per FR-017.

requirement_compliance.title: Invoke `aitri status --json` per project per collection cycle
requirement_compliance.evidence: tests/unit/snapshot-reader.test.js (TC-010h spawn args, TC-010f spawn_failed, TC-010e1 timeout SIGKILL); lib/collector/snapshot-reader.js readSnapshot() with shell=false, 1MiB stdout cap, setTimeout-based SIGKILL @ 3000ms default.

requirement_compliance.title: Snapshot-derived projection replaces 5 legacy collectors
requirement_compliance.evidence: lib/collector/snapshot-reader.js projectFromSnapshot() projects ProjectSnapshot to legacy aitriState/testSummary/bugsSummary/etc shape; lib/collector/index.js dispatches snapshot-first and skips demoted readers on success. Verified by TC-011h (projection equivalence) and TC-011f (integration: bugsSummary populated without BUGS.json on disk).

requirement_compliance.title: Render NEXT ACTION section on ProjectCard
requirement_compliance.evidence: web/src/components/ProjectCard.jsx NextActionRow renders snapshot.nextActions[0]; styles.css .next-action-row(+__badge) tokens. E2E coverage: TC-012h (header+command), TC-012f (urgency badge from priority), TC-012e1 (no horizontal overflow at 375px viewport), TC-012e2 (truncation with title attribute).
requirement_compliance.debt: Light-theme severity palette not added (Hub UI is dark-theme only); App-level loading-skeleton orchestration deferred — skeleton currently renders only on the brief inter-collection window when snapshot fails and no fallback nextActions exist. See 04_IMPLEMENTATION_MANIFEST.json technical_debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Render DEPLOY HEALTH section from `health.deployableReasons[]`
requirement_compliance.evidence: ProjectCard.jsx DeployHealthSection iterates snapshot.health.deployableReasons; styles.css .deploy-health-row severity-aware tokens. TC-013h (renders rows), TC-013f (severity-warn class), TC-013e (hidden when array empty).

requirement_compliance.title: Surface verify and audit staleness in QUALITY section
requirement_compliance.evidence: ProjectCard.jsx QualitySection extended with StalenessIndicators; reads snapshot.health.verifyStalenessDays and snapshot.audit.stalenessDays. TC-014h (verify staleness rendered), TC-014f (audit staleness rendered), TC-014e1 (zero-day omits indicator), TC-014e2 (null staleness omits indicator).

requirement_compliance.title: Surface off-pipeline source changes in BLOCKERS section
requirement_compliance.evidence: ProjectCard.jsx BlockersSection extended with normalize-warning row using snapshot.normalize.{state,method,uncountedFiles}. TC-015h (warning rendered when state=stale), TC-015f (uncountedFiles count interpolated), TC-015e1 (hidden when state=clean), TC-015e2 (hidden when normalize is null).

requirement_compliance.title: Display last-session line under PIPELINE section
requirement_compliance.evidence: ProjectCard.jsx PipelineSection renders formatLastSessionLine(snapshot.lastSession) below phase grid; lib/collector/relative-time.js formatLastSessionLine + formatRelativeTime (browser-safe). TC-016h (verbose 'N days ago' line), TC-016e1 (8 bucket boundary cases for relative time), TC-016f (hidden when lastSession is null).
requirement_compliance.debt: Aitri Core snapshot v1 does not yet expose lastSession — collector reads .aitri JSON directly via inline readAitriRaw for that single field. Remove inline fallback once Aitri Core ships lastSession in snapshot.lastSession.

requirement_compliance.title: Graceful degradation when `aitri status --json` is unavailable
requirement_compliance.evidence: lib/collector/index.js sets degradationReason and calls appendStructuredLog on snapshot failure; falls back to demoted readers (5 legacy modules retained per technical_debt). lib/store/dashboard.js appendStructuredLog writes JSON-line to ~/.aitri-hub/logs/aitri-hub.log. ProjectCard.jsx DegradationRow surfaces degradationReason. TC-017h (degradation row rendered), TC-017e1 (version_too_old skips snapshot entirely), TC-017e2 (failure writes structured log line). Demoted readers and unbounded log growth tracked as NFR debt, not FR debt.

non_functional_compliance.title: Snapshot collection p95 ≤ 500ms
non_functional_compliance.evidence: Implementation has 3000ms hard timeout (SIGKILL) and 1MiB stdout cap; readSnapshot returns durationMs on every call. Latency telemetry surfaced via durationMs but p95 measurement deferred to operational monitoring.

non_functional_compliance.title: ≥400 LOC reduction in active read path
non_functional_compliance.evidence: Snapshot path bypasses 5 demoted readers on success; readers retained on disk as FR-017 fallback. LOC reduction realized at runtime (skip), not at source. Physical deletion deferred until telemetry confirms snapshot success rate ≥99%.

non_functional_compliance.title: No new external dependencies
non_functional_compliance.evidence: snapshot-reader.js uses only node:child_process and node:path (built-ins). package.json diff shows zero dependency additions.

non_functional_compliance.title: WCAG 2.1 AA contrast on dark theme
non_functional_compliance.evidence: Severity tokens (--severity-warn #FDB022, --severity-critical #F97066, --severity-info #84CAFF) verified against dark theme background by TC-DT001 (contrast ratio computed in browser via sRGB → luminance → ratio formula).

non_functional_compliance.title: Structured failure logging
non_functional_compliance.evidence: appendStructuredLog writes JSON-line to ~/.aitri-hub/logs/aitri-hub.log; verified by TC-017e2.
non_functional_compliance.debt: Log rotation absent — file grows unbounded. Acceptable for current scale; rotate via logrotate or implement size-based rotation if hub.log exceeds 10MiB.

deployment.container: Existing Hub Dockerfile (multi-stage, non-root user, HEALTHCHECK against /healthz) — no feature-specific changes required.
deployment.docker_compose: Existing docker-compose.yml — no new services; collector runs in-process within hub container.
environment_variables: AITRI_HUB_DIR (existing, optional override of ~/.aitri-hub for testing)
deployment.rollback: Snapshot dispatch is opt-in by Aitri Core version preflight (>=0.1.77). Projects on older Aitri versions transparently use the legacy reader fallback path — zero migration required.

technical_debt_inherited.substitution: Aitri Core snapshot v1 does not yet expose lastSession — worked around via inline readAitriRaw in collector/index.js that reads .aitri JSON for that single field. Remove once Aitri Core ships lastSession in snapshot.
Severity tokens (--severity-warn/critical/info) only verified for dark theme contrast (WCAG 2.1 AA). Light theme palette not added — light theme is not currently supported by the Hub UI.

TC-S002 skeleton row class (.next-action-skeleton) is rendered when nextActions is null, but App-level data-loading delay is not orchestrated — skeleton currently only appears on the brief render between collection cycles when snapshot fails and no fallback nextActions exist. A dedicated loading state at App.jsx is out of scope for this feature.

5 demoted readers (aitri-reader, requirements-reader, compliance-reader, test-reader, bugs-reader) intentionally retained on disk as the FR-017 fallback path. Deletion deferred to a follow-up feature once telemetry confirms snapshot success rate ≥99% (per NFR-007 scoping note).

Snapshot-failure structured log lines do not yet rotate — log file grows unbounded. Acceptable for current deployment scale; rotate via logrotate or implement size-based rotation in dashboard.js if hub.log exceeds 10MiB.

overall_status_rationale: All 8 FRs covered with passing tests; 6 of 8 FRs at level 'complete', 2 (FR-012, FR-016) at 'partial' with documented debt. NFR-006/NFR-007/NFR-010 also at 'partial' with explicit deferral rationale. Status 'partial' reflects honest debt declaration per Aitri's compliance derivation rule (covered + debt → partial).
